fan_out.axis_a: design-strategy: per-raw classification of governance vs domain-execution role (which raws are L0 SSOT meta-rules vs domain-specific contracts)
fan_out.axis_b: falsifier-coverage: per-cell deterministic verifier — file presence (F1) + shape (F2) + value-set (F3) + id-completeness (F4) + schema gate (F5) + diversity (F6)
fan_out.axis_c: cross-repo-applicability: domain-to-rule semantic mapping — anima(neural/training-dynamics) / hexa-lang(self-host-compiler) / airgenome(scanner) / n6-architecture(formal-banach) / hive(L0-governance)
fan_out.correlation_estimate: axis_a vs axis_b: r ≈ 0.10 (classification taxonomy is independent of cell-level verifier wiring); axis_a vs axis_c: r ≈ 0.35 (governance-vs-domain partly correlated with repo-domain but not strictly); axis_b vs axis_c: r ≈ 0.05 (verifier mechanics independent of domain mapping). Max pairwise |r| ≈ 0.35 < 0.7.

axes_surfaced.name: matrix-column-axis (sister repo selection)
